chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-358 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 3234/23 27-11-2023 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
